✦ The Artist

About Me

Aditi Gursal
🎓 Engineering Student & Visual Artist

I am Aditi Gursal, a dedicated student at Sanjivani College of Engineering, Kopargaon, pursuing my passion for art alongside engineering studies. My artistic journey spans pencil shading, ink mandala art, zentangle, watercolor, poster color painting, and traditional Indian art forms.

Each artwork I create is a heartfelt expression — whether it's the divine grace of Lord Ganesha, the rhythmic patterns of a zentangle peacock, or the vibrant colors of a Rajasthani lady in dance. Art, for me, is the language of the soul.

Mandala & Zentangle Art
Pencil Shading & Portraits
Watercolor Painting
Poster & Acrylic Colors
Indian Folk Art
Still Life Drawing
✦ Technical Project

IOT Project

This art portfolio website is part of an Internet of Things (IOT) project developed under the guidance of Sanjivani College of Engineering, blending creativity with technology.

🔌 IOT Web Project

Art Portfolio Showcase — IOT Integration

This website serves as a digital art showcase developed as an IOT project, demonstrating how technology can bridge the gap between traditional art and the digital world. The platform enables artists to display their work to a global audience through web technologies.
